---
title: "Graphviz & DBML"
---

Classic graph layouts from `.dot`/`.gv` files (@fig-deps) and database
schemas from `.dbml` (@fig-schema) — both rendered locally, no network.
Click to zoom.

```{.dot #fig-deps fig-cap="A dependency graph, inline dot"}
digraph pipeline {
  rankdir=LR;
  node [shape=box, style=rounded];
  filter -> cache -> renderer -> svg;
  filter -> backends;
}
```

```{.dbml #fig-schema fig-cap="A schema, inline DBML"}
Table authors {
  id int [pk]
  name varchar
}

Table figures {
  id int [pk]
  author_id int [ref: > authors.id]
  format varchar
}
```
